title: Weekly Vessel Valuations Report, November 02 2021
summary:
Main
in Weekly Vessel Valuations Report 02/11/2021
Image reference: 2021-11-02_weekly-vessel-valuations-report-november-02-2021_img1.png
Tanker: Tanker values are stable. VLCCs Seaways Liberty (301,000 DWT, Aug 2016, SWS), Seaways Triton and Seaways Cape Henry (300,900 DWT, Jan - Mar 2016, SWS), Seaways Hendricks and Seaways Diamond Head (300,800 DWT, May - Oct 2016, SWS) and Seaways Tybee (300,700 DWT, Oct 2015, SWS) sold to Ocean Yield ASA in an en bloc deal for USD 375.00 mil, VV en bloc value USD 387.78 mil - BBB. Aframaxes Advantage Arrow and Advantage Avenue (115,800 DWT, Nov 2009 - Jun 2010, Samsung) sold to Bergshav AS in an en bloc deal for USD 52.00 mil, VV en bloc value USD 44.37 mil - Inc Charter.
